description: Pedersen second-generator H derivation golden vector. Phase A close-out (v7.75). Cross-implementation anchor: any port of core/vss to another language MUST reproduce these bytes exactly.
procedure: try-and-increment: counter := 0; loop { digest := SHA-256(seed || BE_uint32(counter)); x := digest mod p; if liftable(x): return (x, smaller_y); counter++ }
notes: The terminating_counter MUST be 1 for this seed. Counter 0 yields an x-coordinate whose x^3 + 7 is a non-residue mod p (no curve point); counter 1 yields a liftable x.
The y-coordinate is the smaller of the two valid roots of y^2 = x^3 + 7 mod p (canonical tie-break).
xy_sha256_hex is locked in TestHGenerator_FrozenSeed and is the authoritative change-detector for either coordinate.
Rotating the seed invalidates every Pedersen commitment ever produced. A rotation is a v1 -> v2 migration with an explicit plan; it is NOT a routine change.
